## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on blog content progress, review processes, and production pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The "calibration" blog is approved for staging; GrowthX will implement feedback and prepare it for SpecterOps to publish.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [GrowthX is drafting three new blogs ("lateral movement," "laps exploit," "golden ticket attacks") to test the review process before scaling to five per week.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [A new Airtable automation will notify reviewers (Sev, Kirsten, Jason) when an article is ready, requiring feedback from only two of the three to prevent bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [GrowthX demoed its "Argentic" content pipeline, which uses a self-correcting research agent and advanced fact-checking to ensure technical accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)

## Topics

### Blog Content & Review Process

  - [**"Calibration" Blog:**](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
      - [Feedback implemented; comments will remain open for potential final input from Sev.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
      - [Status in Airtable → "ready to publish."](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
      - [Next: Staging in SpecterOps' CMS for final review before publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [**New Blogs in Progress:**](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
      - ["Lateral movement"](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
      - ["Laps exploit"](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
      - ["How to detect golden ticket attacks"](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
      - [Delivery target: early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [**Review Workflow Automation:**](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
      - [An Airtable automation will email reviewers when an article's status is "reviewing."](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
      - [**Reviewers:** Sev, Kirsten, Jason.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Requires feedback from only two of the three to prevent bottlenecks from busy schedules.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
      - [Meshach will also review for brand tone.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**Topic Backlog:**](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
      - [16 approved topics provide a 2-week backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
      - [Kirsten flagged potential duplicates; GrowthX will audit the list.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
      - [**Context:** Draft titles are AI-generated based on SEMrush data; final titles are manually refined to ensure uniqueness.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)

### AI-Generated Images

  - [GrowthX's new pipeline generates graphics and illustrations, which perform better than AI-generated photos.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [**Feedback:** The "castle" images may appear too playful and require refinement for a professional tone.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [**Next:** GrowthX will share examples in Slack for feedback from Rick, Kirsten, and Bryce.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)

### Content Generation Pipeline Demo

  - [Aida demoed the "Argentic" pipeline in the Atlas platform, designed for technical accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
    1.  [**Research Plan:** Generates an objective and questions for a topic (e.g., "Zero Trust vs. Least Privilege").](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
    2.  [**Self-Correction:** Collects answers, then evaluates them for gaps (e.g., missing cost breakdowns, vendor specifics).](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
    3.  [**Iteration:** If quality is low, the agent asks new questions to fill gaps, repeating until the research passes.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
    4.  [**Advanced Fact-Checking:** Verifies statements and flags unverified claims, allowing manual review.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [**Benefit:** This process provides high confidence in the technical accuracy of the final draft.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)

### Admin & Logistics

  - [**Product Walkthrough:** Rescheduled to 5:15 PM ET today (2:15 PM PT) due to a last-minute customer call for the SpecterOps SE.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [**Looker Dashboard:** Access is pending. Meshach will follow up with the team if the issue is not resolved today.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)

      - [Deliver three new blogs ("lateral movement," "laps exploit," "golden ticket attacks") early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
      - [Set up the Airtable review notification automation for Sev, Kirsten, and Jason.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
      - [Audit the topic backlog for potential duplicates.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
      - [Share AI-generated image examples in Slack for team feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [**Meshach:**](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
      - [Follow up on Looker dashboard access if not resolved today.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [**Erik & Meshach:**](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
      - [Attend the product walkthrough at 5:15 PM ET today.](https://fathom.video/share/2xe6hon5pCAn37eGpHhAUFr_ysnczY_v?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
